name: trap-wrong-group-direction
description: Trap: barX requires groupY, not groupX
messages: Horizontal bar chart of total revenue by product, sorted largest to smallest
rubric: MUST use barX with groupY (NOT groupX). barX is horizontal so the categorical axis is y and quantitative axis is x. groupY aggregates along the y-axis. FAIL if model uses barX with groupX (the #1 horizontal bar mistake). FAIL if model uses barY instead of barX (user explicitly said horizontal). Sort must be descending by revenue.
